messages.content: If I save 500 KES per week, how many weeks to save 6,000 KES?

<think>
Weeks = Total ÷ Weekly savings = 6,000 ÷ 500 = 12 weeks
</think>
12 weeks.
All roses are flowers. All flowers need water. Do roses need water?

<think>
Premise 1: All roses are flowers.
Premise 2: All flowers need water.
Conclusion: Since roses are flowers, and all flowers need water, roses need water.
</think>
Yes, roses need water — this follows directly from both premises.
If yesterday was Monday, what day is tomorrow?

<think>
Yesterday = Monday
Today = Tuesday (day after Monday)
Tomorrow = Wednesday (day after Tuesday)
</think>
Tomorrow is Wednesday.
Hot is to cold as wet is to what?

<think>
Hot and cold are opposites. So I need the opposite of wet.
The opposite of wet is dry.
</think>
Dry.

<think>
3 bags × 7 apples per bag = 21 apples
</think>

If a train leaves at 3pm traveling at 80 km/h, when does it reach a city 200 km away?

<think>
Distance = 200 km, Speed = 80 km/h
Time = Distance ÷ Speed = 200 ÷ 80 = 2.5 hours
3:00 PM + 2.5 hours = 5:30 PM
</think>
The train arrives at 5:30 PM.

If a train leaves at 3pm traveling at 80 km/h, when does it reach a city 200 km away?

</think>
The train arrives at 5:30 PM.

Yesterday = Monday
Today = Tuesday (day after Monday)

</think>

If a train leaves at 3pm traveling at 80 km/h, when does it reach a city 200 km away?

<think>
Distance = 200 km, Speed = 80 km/h
Time = Distance ÷ Speed = 200 ÷ 80 = 2.5 hours
3:00 PM + 2.5 hours = 5:30 PM
</think>
The train arrives at 5:30 PM.
